  • Uses of ByteInputStream in net.boricj.bft

    Methods in net.boricj.bft that return ByteInputStream
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ByteInputStream
    ByteInputStream.asBigEndian(byte[] bytes)
    Creates a big-endian byte input stream from a byte array.
    static ByteInputStream
    ByteInputStream.asBigEndian(InputStream inputStream)
    Creates a big-endian byte input stream from an input stream.
    static ByteInputStream
    ByteInputStream.asLittleEndian(byte[] bytes)
    Creates a little-endian byte input stream from a byte array.
    static ByteInputStream
    ByteInputStream.asLittleEndian(InputStream inputStream)
    Creates a little-endian byte input stream from an input stream.
    ByteInputStream
    ByteInputStream.slice(int length)
    Creates a new ByteInputStream containing the next specified number of bytes.

  • Uses of ByteInputStream in net.boricj.bft.coff

    Methods in net.boricj.bft.coff that return ByteInputStream
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ByteInputStream
    CoffFile.wrap(InputStream inputStream)
    Wraps an input stream using the byte order configured by this COFF file.
    protected ByteInputStream
    CoffHeader.wrap(InputStream inputStream)
    Wraps an input stream with little-endian byte order.
